Title: SAMPLE BY
Description: The command changes thesampling keyof the table tonew_expression(an expression or a tuple of expressions). The primary key must contain the new sample key.
The command removes thesampling keyof the table.
The commandsMODIFYandREMOVEare lightweight in the sense that they only change metadata or remove files.
It only works for tables in theMergeTreefamily (includingreplicatedtables).
